title: tofieldia calyculata
intro: Tofieldia calyculata, also known as the bog bean, is a type of flowering plant in the family Tofieldiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tofieldia calyculata are thought to include treating conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and edema. Tofieldia calyculata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
